Hero has ${key} on ${boardStr(board)} (${tex} board). BB checks. Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`Flop: IP c-bet decision (${tex} board)` }; } }, // ── POSTFLOP: OOP facing c-bet ── { cat:'postflop', name:'BB facing IP c-bet', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const oppPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const cards=drawFromRange(NLBBDEF); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board); const pot=itr?`${bb*6}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*6)}`; const betSize=Math.round(parseDollar(String(pot))*0.5); const callAmt=itr?`${bb*3}bb`:`$${betSize}`; let correct; if(str==='monster') correct='Check-raise for value'; else if(str==='strong') correct='Call (pot control, re-evaluate turn)'; else if(str==='draw'&&tex==='wet') correct='Call or check-raise semi-bluff'; else if(str==='medium') correct='Call (defend with showdown value)'; else correct='Fold (not enough equity or showdown value)'; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`${oppPos} opens, hero defends BB. Flop: ${boardStr(board)}. Hero checks. ${oppPos} bets 50% pot.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'facing_bet'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos:'BB',allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:String(callAmt),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex,str, rangeNote:`${key} on ${boardStr(board)} — ${str} (${tex})`, pfContext:`Hero in BB with ${key}. Facing ${oppPos}'s 50% pot c-bet on ${boardStr(board)} (${tex} board). Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`Flop: OOP facing c-bet (${tex} board)` }; } }, // ── POSTFLOP: Turn barrel or check ── { cat:'postflop', name:'Turn bet or check (IP)', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const cards=drawFromRange(NLRFI[heroPos]||NLRFI.BTN); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,4); const flop=board.slice(0,3), turn=board[3]; const tex=boardTex(flop); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board); const pot=itr?`${bb*14}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*14)}`; let correct; if(str==='monster'||str==='strong') correct=`Bet 66% pot (build pot for river)`; else if(str==='draw') correct=`Bet 50% pot (semi-bluff, fold equity + outs)`; else if(str==='medium') correct=`Check (pot control, bluff-catch)`; else correct=`Check (weak hand, give up or reassess river)`; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`Hero opened ${heroPos}, BB called. C-bet flop called. Turn: ${boardStr([turn])}. BB checks.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'turn'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'Turn', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex,str, rangeNote:`${key} on turn — ${str}`, pfContext:`Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Flop: ${boardStr(flop)}, Turn: ${boardStr([turn])}. BB checks. Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`Turn: barrel or check IP` }; } }, // ── POSTFLOP: River value or check ── { cat:'postflop', name:'River value bet or check', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const cards=drawFromRange(NLRFI[heroPos]||NLRFI.BTN); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,5); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board.slice(0,3)); const pot=itr?`${bb*36}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*36)}`; let correct; if(str==='monster') correct=`Bet 100% pot (thin the field, extract max)`; else if(str==='strong') correct=`Bet 66% pot (value, 3 streets)`; else if(str==='medium') correct=`Check back (marginal SDV, don't bloat pot)`; else correct=`Check back (missed draw, no value to extract)`; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`3-bet pot. Hero c-bet flop and turn, both called. River: ${boardStr([board[4]])}. Villain checks.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'river'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'River', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,str, rangeNote:`${key} — river showdown value: ${str}`, pfContext:`Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Board: ${boardStr(board)}. Villain checks river. Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`River: value bet or check IP` }; } }, // ── BLUFFING: River bluff ── { cat:'bluffing', name:'River bluff with missed draw', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); // Draw hands that are likely to miss const drawRange=new Set([...NLRFI[heroPos]||NLRFI.BTN].filter(k=>{ const c=decodeHandKey(k); return k.endsWith('s'); // suited = potential flush draw })); const cards=drawFromRange(drawRange); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,5); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board.slice(0,3)); const pot=itr?`${bb*24}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*24)}`; // Blocker = holds ace (blocks villain's value range) const hasBlocker=cards[0].rank==='A'||cards[1].rank==='A'||cards[0].rank==='K'||cards[1].rank==='K'; let correct; if(str==='weak'&&hasBlocker) correct=`Overbet bluff 120% pot (blocker advantage, polarized range)`; else if(str==='weak') correct=`Give up and check (no blocker, low fold equity)`; else correct=`Check back (showdown value, don't turn hand into bluff)`; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`Hero 3-bet from ${heroPos}, BB called. Flop bet called. Turn checked through. River: ${boardStr([board[4]])}. BB checks to hero.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'bluff'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'River', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,str, rangeNote:`${key} — ${hasBlocker?'has blocker, bluff candidate':'no blocker, check back'}`, pfContext:`Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Board: ${boardStr(board)}. Missed draw. BB checks river. Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`River: bluff or give up` }; } }, // ── BLUFFING: Flop semi-bluff check-raise ── { cat:'bluffing', name:'Semi-bluff check-raise on flop', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const cards=drawFromRange(NLBBDEF); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board); const pot=itr?`${bb*6}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*6)}`; let correct; if(str==='draw'&&tex!=='dry') correct=`Check-raise semi-bluff (strong equity + fold equity)`; else if(str==='monster') correct=`Check-raise for value`; else if(str==='draw'&&tex==='dry') correct=`Call (draw has less value on dry board, insufficient fold equity for CR)`; else correct=`Call or fold (not strong enough to check-raise, not enough equity)`; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`BTN opens, hero defends BB. Flop: ${boardStr(board)}. Hero checks. BTN bets 50% pot.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'semib'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos:'BB',allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:itr?`${bb*3}bb`:`$${Math.round(parseDollar(String(pot))*0.5)}`, blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex,str, rangeNote:`${key} on ${boardStr(board)} — ${str} (${tex})`, pfContext:`Hero in BB with ${key}. BTN bets 50% pot on ${boardStr(board)} (${tex} board). Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`Flop: semi-bluff check-raise OOP` }; } } ]; function buildPostWrong(correct, type){ const pools={ cbet:['Bet 25% pot (range bet dry board)','Bet 50% pot','Bet 100% pot (overbet)','Check (protect checking range on wet board)','Check (marginal hand, mixed strategy)','Check (marginal hand, mixed strategy on wet board)'], facing_bet:['Fold (not enough equity or showdown value)','Call (defend with showdown value)','Call (pot control, re-evaluate turn)','Check-raise for value','Call or check-raise semi-bluff'], turn:['Bet 66% pot (build pot for river)','Bet 50% pot (semi-bluff, fold equity + outs)','Check (pot control, bluff-catch)','Check (weak hand, give up or reassess river)','Bet 33% pot'], river:['Bet 100% pot (thin the field, extract max)','Bet 66% pot (value, 3 streets)','Check back (marginal SDV, don\'t bloat pot)','Check back (missed draw, no value)','Bet 33% pot (thin value)'], bluff:['Overbet bluff 120% pot (blocker advantage, polarized range)','Give up and check (no blocker, low fold equity)','Check back (showdown value, don\'t turn hand into bluff)','Bet 50% pot bluff','Bet 33% pot'], semib:['Check-raise semi-bluff (strong equity + fold equity)','Check-raise for value','Call (draw has less value on dry board)','Call or fold (not strong enough to check-raise)','Fold (insufficient equity)'] }; const pool=pools[type]||pools.cbet; return shuffleArr(pool.filter(o=>o!==correct)).slice(0,3); } // ── PLO Preflop Templates ───────────────────────────────────────── const PLO_PF_TEMPLATES = [ { cat:'preflop', name:'PLO RFI decision', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const pos=randFrom(['UTG','MP','HJ','CO','BTN']); // PLO: premium = open any pos; strong = HJ+; playable = CO+ const tierMap={UTG:['premium'],MP:['premium'],HJ:['premium','strong'],CO:['premium','strong','playable'],BTN:['premium','strong','playable'],SB:['premium','strong']}; const tiers=tierMap[pos]||['premium']; const inRange=Math.random()>0.25; // 75% show in-range const hand=inRange?drawPLOHand(tiers):drawPLOHand(['playable']); // playable from UTG = outside range const correct=inRange?`Raise pot to ${itr?Math.round(3.5*bb)+'bb':'$'+Math.round(3.5*bb)}`:'Fold'; const key=hand.handName; const wrong=['Call (no limping in PLO GTO)','Fold','Raise pot to '+( itr?'2bb':'$'+Math.round(2*bb))+' (undersize)','Raise pot to '+(itr?'5bb':'$'+Math.round(5*bb))+' (oversize)'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); const pot=itr?`${bb*1.5}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*1.5)}`; return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:[], heroPos:pos,allPos,seats,street:'Preflop', pfHistory:`Folds to hero in ${pos}. No one has entered the pot.`, potDisplay:String(pot),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key, rangeNote:`${key} (${hand.desc}) — ${inRange?'✓ In PLO open range for '+pos:'✗ Marginal, fold from '+pos}`, pfContext:`PLO. Hero in ${pos} with ${key} (${hand.desc}). Folds around. Stack: ${stackStr}. In PLO, always pot-raise or fold — no limping.`, actionLabel:`PLO Preflop: RFI from ${pos}` }; } }, { cat:'preflop', name:'PLO 3-bet pot or call vs open', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const openerPos=randFrom(['UTG','MP','HJ','CO','BTN']); const heroPos=randFrom(['CO','BTN','SB','BB'].filter(p=>p!==openerPos)); const hand=drawPLOHand(['premium','strong']); const isPremium=PLO_TIERS.premium.some(t=>t.h===hand.handName); const correct=isPremium?`3-bet pot to ${itr?Math.round(11*bb)+'bb':'$'+Math.round(11*bb)}`:'Call (flat premium rundowns and pairs)'; const key=hand.handName; const potOpenSize=itr?`3.5bb`:`$${Math.round(3.5*bb)}`; const pot=itr?`${bb*8}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*8)}`; const wrong=['Call (flat premium rundowns and pairs)','3-bet pot to '+(itr?Math.round(11*bb)+'bb':'$'+Math.round(11*bb)),'Fold','Min-raise'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:[], heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'Preflop', pfHistory:`${openerPos} pot-raises to ${potOpenSize}. Folds to hero in ${heroPos}.`, potDisplay:String(pot),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key, rangeNote:`${key} — ${isPremium?'✓ Premium: 3-bet eligible':'✓ Strong: call and see flop'}`, pfContext:`PLO. ${openerPos} opens pot. Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key} (${hand.desc}). Stack: ${stackStr}.`, actionLabel:`PLO Preflop: ${heroPos} facing ${openerPos} open` }; } } ]; // ── PLO Postflop Templates ──────────────────────────────────────── const PLO_POST_TEMPLATES = [ { cat:'postflop', name:'PLO flop: top set vs draw-heavy board', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const hand=drawPLOHand(['premium']); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!hand.cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const pot=itr?`${bb*8}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*8)}`; // In PLO, charge draws immediately — big bets on flop const correct=tex==='wet'?`Bet pot (protect vs multiple draws in PLO)`:`Bet 66% pot (value, semi-dry board)`; const key=hand.handName; const pfHistory=`3-bet pot pre. Hero in ${heroPos}. Flop: ${boardStr(board)}. Villain checks.`; const wrong=['Check (pot control)','Bet 33% pot (small bet)','Bet pot (protect vs multiple draws in PLO)','Bet 66% pot (value, semi-dry board)','Check-raise if bet into'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex, rangeNote:`${key} — PLO flop (${tex})`, pfContext:`PLO 3-bet pot. Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Flop: ${boardStr(board)} (${tex}). Villain checks. Pot: ${pot}. In PLO, draws have massive equity — charge them immediately.`, actionLabel:`PLO Flop: set on ${tex} board` }; } }, { cat:'postflop', name:'PLO flop: wrap draw decision', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ // Hero has a wrap/wrap+flush draw — should usually charge or semi-bluff const hand=drawPLOHand(['strong','playable']); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!hand.cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const pot=itr?`${bb*7}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*7)}`; const betAmt=itr?`${bb*3.5}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*3.5)}`; const correct=`Call (wrap draws have ~60% equity vs sets in PLO — need implied odds)`; const key=hand.handName; const pfHistory=`Opponent pot-bets ${betAmt} on ${boardStr(board)}. Hero in BB with wrap draw potential.`; const wrong=['Fold (draws are weak in PLO)','Raise pot (semi-bluff re-raise)','Call (wrap draws have ~60% equity vs sets in PLO — need implied odds)','Fold unless nut flush draw also present'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:board, heroPos:'BB',allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:String(betAmt),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex, rangeNote:`${key} — PLO wrap draw on ${boardStr(board)}`, pfContext:`PLO. Hero in BB with ${key} (${hand.desc}). Facing pot-bet on ${boardStr(board)}. PLO draws are extremely powerful — wraps can have 13-20 outs.`, actionLabel:`PLO Flop: facing bet with wrap draw` }; } }, { cat:'bluffing', name:'PLO river: give up or bluff?', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const hand=drawPLOHand(['strong','playable']); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!hand.cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,5); const pot=itr?`${bb*30}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*30)}`; // In PLO bluffing is riskier — opponents call wider with 2-pair, sets const correct=`Give up and check (bluffing river in PLO is high variance — opponents call wider)`; const key=hand.handName; const pfHistory=`3-bet pot pre, c-bet flop, turn checked. River: ${boardStr([board[4]])}. Villain checks to hero.`; const wrong=['Overbet bluff pot (polarized range)','Give up and check (bluffing river in PLO is high variance — opponents call wider)','Bet 50% pot bluff','Small bet 33% pot (block bet)'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'River', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key, rangeNote:`${key} — PLO river bluff spot`, pfContext:`PLO. Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Board: ${boardStr(board)}. Missed draw scenario. In PLO, villain's calling range is very wide — bluffing rivers requires near-nut blockers.`, actionLabel:`PLO River: bluff or give up` }; } } ]; // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // STATE // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const state={ variant:'holdem',format:'cash',cat:'preflop', difficulty:'Intermediate',villain:'TAG', showPotOdds:false,sessionMode:false,sessionCount:0,sessionAnswers:[], user:null,users:[], quiz:null,selected:null,loading:false,streak:0, hintUsed:false,hint:null }; const S={ get:k=>{try{const v=localStorage.getItem(k);return v?JSON.parse(v):null;}catch{return null;}}, set:(k,v)=>{try{localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(v));}catch{}} }; const loadUsers=()=>S.get('upc:users')||[]; const saveUsers=u=>S.set('upc:users',u); const loadProfile=id=>S.get('upc:p:'+id); const saveProfile=(id,d)=>S.set('upc:p:'+id,d); function emptyProfile(name){ return{name,sessions:0,totalQ:0,totalCorrect:0, cats:{preflop:{q:0,c:0},postflop:{q:0,c:0},bluffing:{q:0,c:0}}, history:[],streakBest:0,handLog:[]}; } function getKey(){return localStorage.getItem('upc_api_key')||'';} async function callClaude(sys,msg,maxTokens){ const key=getKey(); if(!key) throw new Error('No API key.'); const res=await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','x-api-key':key,'anthropic-version':'2023-06-01','anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access':'true'}, body:JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:maxTokens||900,system:sys,messages:[{role:'user',content:msg}]}) }); const data=await res.json(); if(data.error) throw new Error(data.error.message); return data.content.map(i=>i.text||'').join(''); } function startApp(){ const key=(document.getElementById('api-key').value||'').trim(); const err=document.getElementById('gate-err'); err.style.display='none'; if(!key){err.textContent='Please enter your API key.';err.style.display='block';return;} if(!key.startsWith('sk-ant-')){err.textContent='Invalid key — should start with sk-ant-';err.style.display='block';return;} localStorage.setItem('upc_api_key',key); launchApp(); } function launchApp(){ document.getElementById('gate').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('app').style.display='flex'; state.users=loadUsers(); showUserSelect(); } window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{ const saved=localStorage.getItem('upc_api_key'); if(saved&&saved.startsWith('sk-ant-')){launchApp();} const inp=document.getElementById('api-key'); if(inp) inp.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')startApp();}); }); function showUserSelect(){ const users=state.users; let html=`
Upgrade Poker Coach
Select your profile
`; users.forEach(u=>{ const pct=u.totalQ?Math.round((u.totalCorrect/u.totalQ)*100):0; html+=``; }); html+=``; document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=html; document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='flex'; } function showAddUser(){ document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=`
Add Player
`; setTimeout(()=>{const n=document.getElementById('new-name');if(n)n.focus();},100); } function addUser(){ const name=(document.getElementById('new-name').value||'').trim(); const err=document.getElementById('name-err'); if(!name){err.textContent='Enter a name';err.style.display='block';return;} if(state.users.find(u=>u.name.toLowerCase()===name.toLowerCase())){err.textContent='Name taken';err.style.display='block';return;} const id='u_'+Date.now(); const profile=emptyProfile(name); state.users.push({id,name,totalQ:0,totalCorrect:0}); saveUsers(state.users); saveProfile(id,profile); selectUser(id); } function selectUser(id){ let p=loadProfile(id); if(!p) p=emptyProfile(state.users.find(u=>u.id===id)?.name||'Player'); p.sessions=(p.sessions||0)+1; saveProfile(id,p); state.user={...p,id}; state.streak=0; closeOverlay(); updateTopBar(); fetchQuiz(); } function switchUser(){showUserSelect();} function updateTopBar(){ const p=state.user;if(!p)return; document.getElementById('avatar').textContent=p.name[0].toUpperCase(); document.getElementById('uname').textContent=p.name; const tQ=p.totalQ||0,tC=p.totalCorrect||0; const pct=tQ?Math.round((tC/tQ)*100):0; const col=pct>=70?'#4ade80':pct>=40?'#facc15':'#f87171'; document.getElementById('score-badge').innerHTML=tC+'/'+tQ+' ('+pct+'%)'; } function persistUser(){ const p=state.user;if(!p)return; saveProfile(p.id,p); state.users=state.users.map(u=>u.id===p.id?{...u,totalQ:p.totalQ,totalCorrect:p.totalCorrect}:u); saveUsers(state.users); updateTopBar(); } function setVariant(v){ state.variant=v; ['holdem','plo','mixed'].forEach(x=>{const el=document.getElementById('seg-'+x);if(el)el.className=x===v?'active':'';}); fetchQuiz(); } function setFormat(f){ state.format=f; document.getElementById('seg-cash').className=f==='cash'?'active':''; document.getElementById('seg-tourney').className=f==='tournament'?'active':''; const note=document.getElementById('tourney-note'); if(note)note.style.display=f==='tournament'?'inline':'none'; fetchQuiz(); } function setCat(c){ state.cat=c; ['preflop','postflop','bluffing'].forEach(x=>{ const el=document.getElementById('cat-'+x);if(!el)return; if(x===c){el.style.background='#1a9a9a';el.style.borderColor='#1a9a9a';el.style.color='#fff';el.style.fontWeight='700';} else{el.style.background='transparent';el.style.borderColor='#333';el.style.color='#555';el.style.fontWeight='400';} }); fetchQuiz(); } function togglePotOdds(){ state.showPotOdds=!state.showPotOdds; const t=document.getElementById('po-toggle'),th=document.getElementById('po-thumb'),lb=document.getElementById('po-label'); if(t)t.style.background=state.showPotOdds?'#1a9a9a':'#222'; if(th)th.style.left=state.showPotOdds?'22px':'2px'; if(lb)lb.style.color=state.showPotOdds?'#1a9a9a':'#444'; renderQuiz(); } function startSession(){ state.sessionMode=true;state.sessionCount=0;state.sessionAnswers=[]; const btn=document.getElementById('session-btn');if(btn)btn.textContent='0/10'; fetchQuiz(); } function setTab(t){ document.getElementById('panel-train').style.display=t==='train'?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('panel-tools').style.display=t==='tools'?'flex':'none'; ['train','tools'].forEach(x=>{ const el=document.getElementById('tab-'+x);if(!el)return; el.style.color=x===t?'#1a9a9a':'#444'; el.style.fontWeight=x===t?'700':'400'; el.style.borderBottom=x===t?'2px solid #1a9a9a':'2px solid transparent'; }); if(t==='tools')setTool('equity'); } function setTool(t){ ['equity','bankroll','handlog'].forEach(x=>{ const el=document.getElementById('tool-'+x);if(!el)return; el.style.background=x===t?'#1a9a9a':'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'; el.style.color=x===t?'#fff':'#555'; }); const area=document.getElementById('tool-area');if(!area)return; if(t==='equity')area.innerHTML=renderEquityCalc(); if(t==='bankroll')area.innerHTML=renderBankroll(); if(t==='handlog')area.innerHTML=renderHandLog(); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FETCH QUIZ // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ async function fetchQuiz(){ if(!state.user)return; state.loading=true;state.quiz=null;state.selected=null;state.hintUsed=false;state.hint=null; renderQuiz(); try{ const isTourney=state.format==='tournament'; const isGame=state.variant==='mixed'?(Math.random()>0.5?'plo':'nlh'):state.variant==='plo'?'plo':'nlh'; const ctx=buildScenario(state.cat,isGame,isTourney); // Build options array const allOpts=shuffleArr([ctx.correct,...ctx.wrong].slice(0,4)); const correctIdx=allOpts.indexOf(ctx.correct); const diffDesc={ Beginner:'Simple explanation. Focus on fundamentals.', Intermediate:'Reference position, ranges, equity, pot odds.', Advanced:'GTO-level: MDF, polarization, blockers, solver frequencies.' }[state.difficulty]||''; const isPLO=isGame==='plo'; const sys=`You are an expert ${isPLO?'PLO':'NL Hold\'em'} GTO poker coach. The hand, position, preflop action, and correct answer are already determined by a range engine. Your ONLY job: write a 2-sentence vivid scenario description and a 3-4 sentence GTO explanation. DO NOT invent or change any of the action — only describe what is given to you. Villain type: ${state.villain}. ${diffDesc} ${isPLO?'PLO-specific: mention wraps, nut flush draws, multi-way equity when relevant.':''} Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown: {"scenario":"2 sentences describing the exact action given","explanation":"3-4 sentences GTO reasoning","hintText":"1 sentence hint without revealing answer"}`; const prompt=`Game: ${ctx.variant}. Format: ${isTourney?'Tournament':'Cash'}. Hero position: ${ctx.heroPos}. Hole cards: ${ctx.holeCards.map(c=>c.rank+c.suit).join(' ')}. Preflop/action context (USE EXACTLY THIS): ${ctx.pfContext} Correct action: ${ctx.correct} Wrong options shown: ${ctx.wrong.join(' / ')} Board: ${ctx.communityCards?.length?boardStr(ctx.communityCards):'(preflop)'} Range note: ${ctx.rangeNote}`; const txt=await callClaude(sys,prompt,800); const parsed=JSON.parse(txt.replace(/```json|```/g,'').trim()); const potAmt=parseDollar(ctx.potDisplay); const callAmt=parseDollar(ctx.callAmt||'0'); const ratio=callAmt>0?((potAmt+callAmt)/callAmt).toFixed(1)+':1':'N/A'; const bePct=callAmt>0?Math.round((callAmt/(potAmt+callAmt))*100)+'%':'N/A'; state.quiz={ variant:ctx.variant, gameType:isTourney?'Tournament':'Cash Game', street:ctx.street, heroPosition:ctx.heroPos, numSeats:ctx.seats, allPositions:ctx.allPos, stackSizes:buildStacks(ctx.seats,isTourney), bets:{}, potDisplay:ctx.potDisplay, blinds:ctx.blinds, holeCards:ctx.holeCards, communityCards:ctx.communityCards||[], scenario:parsed.scenario, question:'What is the correct GTO action?', options:allOpts, correctIndex:correctIdx, explanation:parsed.explanation, hintText:parsed.hintText, rangeNote:ctx.rangeNote, actionLabel:ctx.actionLabel, potOdds:callAmt>0?{ potSize:ctx.potDisplay, callAmount:'$'+callAmt, oddsRatio:ratio, breakEvenPct:bePct, impliedOdds:isPLO?'PLO implied odds are massive with wrap+flush draws':'Consider stack depth and villain tendencies', recommendation:callAmt/(potAmt+callAmt)<0.33?'Fold (pot odds insufficient)':'Call (pot odds sufficient)' }:null }; }catch(e){ state.quiz={error:true,msg:e.message||'Unknown error'}; } state.loading=false; renderQuiz(); } function buildStacks(seats,isTourney){ const base=isTourney?randFrom([5000,8000,10000,15000]):randFrom([200,300,500]); return Array.from({length:seats},()=>{ const v=base*(0.7+Math.random()*0.8); return isTourney?Math.round(Math.max(1000,v)).toLocaleString():'$'+Math.round(Math.max(50,v)); }); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // RENDER // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function tableHTML(quiz){ const cx=300,cy=150,rx=220,ry=110; const seats=quiz.numSeats||6; const posLabels=quiz.allPositions||['UTG','MP','HJ','CO','BTN','BB']; const heroPos=quiz.heroPosition||''; const stackSizes=quiz.stackSizes||[]; let inner=` `; const cc=quiz.communityCards||[]; if(cc.length>0){ const cw=37,ch=53,gap=5; const totalW=cc.length*cw+(cc.length-1)*gap; const sx=cx-totalW/2,sy=cy-ch/2; cc.forEach((c,i)=>{ const x=sx+i*(cw+gap); const isR=c.suit==='h'||c.suit==='d'; const sym=SYM[c.suit]||c.suit; inner+=` ${c.rank} ${sym} ${c.rank}`; }); if(quiz.potDisplay&&quiz.potDisplay!=='$0') inner+=`POT ${quiz.potDisplay}`; } else if(quiz.potDisplay&&quiz.potDisplay!=='$0'){ inner+=` POT ${quiz.potDisplay}`; } for(let i=0;i`; if(isBtn)inner+=`D`; inner+=`${label}`; if(isHero)inner+=`YOU`; if(stack)inner+=`${stack}`; if(isHero&&quiz.holeCards?.length){ const hc=quiz.holeCards; const cw=hc.length===4?22:26,ch=hc.length===4?32:37,cgap=3; const totalCW=hc.length*cw+(hc.length-1)*cgap; const hx=x-totalCW/2,hy=y+(stack?54:48); hc.forEach((c,ci)=>{ const cx2=hx+ci*(cw+cgap); const isR=c.suit==='h'||c.suit==='d'; const sym=SYM[c.suit]||c.suit; inner+=` ${c.rank} ${sym} ${c.rank}`; }); } } return `
`; } function renderQuiz(){ const area=document.getElementById('quiz-area');if(!area)return; if(state.loading){ area.innerHTML=`
♠
Building GTO scenario...
`; return; } const q=state.quiz;if(!q)return; if(q.error){ area.innerHTML=`
Failed to load scenario
${q.msg||''}
`; return; } let html=`
`; [q.variant,q.gameType,q.street,'Pos: '+(q.heroPosition||'—'),'vs '+state.villain,state.difficulty].forEach((t,i)=>{ html+=`${t}`; }); if(q.rangeNote){ const isIn=q.rangeNote.includes('✓'); html+=`${q.rangeNote}`; } html+=`
`; if(q.actionLabel){ html+=`
${q.actionLabel}
`; } html+=`
${tableHTML(q)}
`; html+=`
`; [{l:'Street',v:q.street,c:'#1a9a9a'},{l:'Pos',v:q.heroPosition||'—',c:'#fff'},{l:'Pot',v:q.potDisplay||'—',c:'#facc15'},{l:'Blinds',v:q.blinds||'1/2',c:'#4ade80'}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
`; html+=`
${q.scenario}
`; html+=`
${q.question}
`; if(q.potOdds){ const po=q.potOdds; html+=`
Pot Odds — ${state.showPotOdds?'Revealed':'Hidden'}
`; if(state.showPotOdds){ html+=`
`; [{l:'Pot Size',v:po.potSize,c:'#facc15'},{l:'Call Amount',v:po.callAmount,c:'#f87171'},{l:'Odds Ratio',v:po.oddsRatio,c:'#1a9a9a'},{l:'Break-even',v:po.breakEvenPct,c:'#4ade80'}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
Implied: ${po.impliedOdds}
Math says: ${po.recommendation}
`; } else { html+=`
Calculate the odds yourself — then toggle to check
`; } html+=`
`; } if(state.selected===null){ if(!state.hintUsed){ html+=``; } else if(state.hint){ html+=`
Hint: ${state.hint}
`; } } html+=`
`; (q.options||[]).forEach((opt,i)=>{ let cls='opt-btn',icon=String.fromCharCode(65+i); if(state.selected!==null){ if(i===q.correctIndex){cls+=' correct';icon='✓';} else if(i===state.selected){cls+=' wrong';icon='✗';} else cls+=' dimmed'; } html+=``; }); html+=`
`; if(state.selected!==null){ const ok=state.selected===q.correctIndex; html+=`
${ok?'Correct! ✓':'Incorrect ✗'}
${q.explanation}
`; } area.innerHTML=html; } function answer(idx){ if(state.selected!==null||!state.quiz||state.quiz.error)return; state.selected=idx; const ok=idx===state.quiz.correctIndex; state.streak=ok?state.streak+1:0; const p=state.user;if(!p)return; p.totalQ=(p.totalQ||0)+1; p.totalCorrect=(p.totalCorrect||0)+(ok?1:0); p.streakBest=Math.max(p.streakBest||0,state.streak); const cat=state.cat; p.cats=p.cats||{preflop:{q:0,c:0},postflop:{q:0,c:0},bluffing:{q:0,c:0}}; p.cats[cat]=p.cats[cat]||{q:0,c:0}; p.cats[cat].q++;if(ok)p.cats[cat].c++; p.history=[...((p.history||[]).slice(-199)),{ts:Date.now(),cat,correct:ok,q:(state.quiz.question||'').slice(0,60)}]; p.handLog=[...((p.handLog||[]).slice(-499)),{ts:Date.now(),cat,correct:ok,question:state.quiz.question,yourAnswer:state.quiz.options?.[idx]}]; persistUser(); if(state.sessionMode){ state.sessionAnswers.push({correct:ok,question:state.quiz.question}); state.sessionCount++; const btn=document.getElementById('session-btn');if(btn)btn.textContent=state.sessionCount+'/10'; if(state.sessionCount>=10)setTimeout(showSessionReport,400); } renderQuiz(); } async function getHint(){ const q=state.quiz;if(!q||state.hintUsed)return; if(q.hintText){state.hint=q.hintText;state.hintUsed=true;renderQuiz();return;} state.hintUsed=true;renderQuiz(); try{ const t=await callClaude('Give ONE short GTO poker hint (1 sentence) without revealing the answer.', 'Hand: '+JSON.stringify({holeCards:q.holeCards,scenario:q.scenario,question:q.question,rangeNote:q.rangeNote}),200); state.hint=t.replace(/```/g,'').trim(); }catch{state.hint='Consider your position, range advantage, and pot odds.';} renderQuiz(); } function showSessionReport(){ const answers=state.sessionAnswers||[]; const correct=answers.filter(a=>a.correct).length; const pct=Math.round((correct/answers.length)*100); const col=pct>=70?'#4ade80':pct>=40?'#facc15':'#f87171'; let html=`
${pct}%
${correct}/${answers.length} correct · ${state.cat} session
`; [{l:'Correct',v:correct,c:'#4ade80'},{l:'Wrong',v:answers.length-correct,c:'#f87171'},{l:'Accuracy',v:pct+'%',c:col}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
`; document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=html; document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='flex'; } function showAnalytics(){ const p=state.user;if(!p)return; const tQ=p.totalQ||0,tC=p.totalCorrect||0,ov=tQ?Math.round((tC/tQ)*100):0; const ovc=ov>=70?'#4ade80':ov>=40?'#facc15':'#f87171'; let html=`
${p.name} — Analytics
${p.sessions||0} sessions · ${tQ} questions · Best streak: ${p.streakBest||0}
`; [{l:'Accuracy',v:tQ?ov+'%':'—',c:ovc},{l:'Questions',v:tQ,c:'#1a9a9a'},{l:'Correct',v:tC,c:'#4ade80'}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
Category Breakdown
`; ['preflop','postflop','bluffing'].forEach(cat=>{ const s=p.cats?.[cat]||{q:0,c:0},pct=s.q?Math.round((s.c/s.q)*100):0,col=pct>=70?'#4ade80':pct>=40?'#facc15':'#f87171'; html+=`
${cat} ${s.c}/${s.q}${s.q>0?` ${pct}%`:''}
`; }); html+=`
`; const leaks=['preflop','postflop','bluffing'].filter(c=>(p.cats?.[c]?.q||0)>=3&&Math.round(((p.cats[c].c||0)/(p.cats[c].q||1))*100)<60); const strengths=['preflop','postflop','bluffing'].filter(c=>(p.cats?.[c]?.q||0)>=3&&Math.round(((p.cats[c].c||0)/(p.cats[c].q||1))*100)>=70); html+=`
Leaks
${leaks.length?leaks.map(c=>`
${c}
`).join(''):'
None found yet
'}
Strengths
${strengths.length?strengths.map(c=>`
${c}
`).join(''):'
Keep playing!
'}
`; document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=html; document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='flex'; } function showHandAnalyzer(){ document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=`
Hand Analyzer
Paste any hand for GTO analysis
`; document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='flex'; } async function analyzeHand(){ const txt=(document.getElementById('hand-txt')?.value||'').trim(); if(!txt)return; const res=document.getElementById('hand-result'); if(res)res.innerHTML='
Analyzing...
'; try{ const sys=`Expert GTO poker coach (NLH and PLO). Reference solver ranges, MDF, and GTO principles. Grade each street A/B/C/D. Respond ONLY valid JSON: {"summary":"","heroCards":"","gameContext":"","result":"","overallGrade":"A","gradeSummary":"","streets":[{"street":"Preflop","action":"","grade":"A","verdict":"Good","analysis":"","alternative":null}],"keyMistakes":[],"wellPlayed":[],"studyTip":""}`; const t=await callClaude(sys,'Analyze:\n\n'+txt,1500); const r=JSON.parse(t.replace(/```json|```/g,'').trim()); const gc={A:'#4ade80',B:'#86efac',C:'#facc15',D:'#f87171'}; const vc={Good:'#4ade80',Okay:'#facc15',Mistake:'#f87171'}; let html=`
${r.overallGrade}
${r.summary}
${r.gameContext} · ${r.result}
${r.gradeSummary}
`; (r.streets||[]).forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.street} ${s.verdict} ${s.grade}
${s.action}
${s.analysis}
${s.alternative?`
GTO alt: ${s.alternative}
`:''}
`; }); if(r.studyTip)html+=`
GTO Tip
${r.studyTip}
`; html+=``; if(res)res.innerHTML=html; }catch(e){ if(res)res.innerHTML=`
Failed: ${e.message}
`; } } function renderEquityCalc(){ return `
Supports NLH (2 cards) and PLO (4 cards). E.g. Ah Kd Qs Jc for PLO.
Hand 1
Hand 2
Board (optional)
`; } async function calcEquity(){ const h1=document.getElementById('eq-h1')?.value||'',h2=document.getElementById('eq-h2')?.value||'',board=document.getElementById('eq-board')?.value||''; const res=document.getElementById('eq-result');if(!res)return; const isPLO=h1.trim().split(/\s+/).length>=4; res.innerHTML='
Calculating...
'; try{ const t=await callClaude(`${isPLO?'PLO':'NLH'} equity calculator. Use standard combinatorics. ${isPLO?'In PLO players use exactly 2 hole cards + 3 board cards.':''} Respond ONLY valid JSON: {"hand1":{"cards":"${h1}","equity":47.3,"description":"top pair top kicker"},"hand2":{"cards":"${h2}","equity":52.7,"description":"overpair"},"ties":0.0,"analysis":"2-3 sentences including GTO implications."}`,`Hand 1: ${h1}\nHand 2: ${h2}\nBoard: ${board||'none (runout equity)'}`,600); const r=JSON.parse(t.replace(/```json|```/g,'').trim()); let html=''; [{h:r.hand1,col:'#7dd3fc'},{h:r.hand2,col:'#f9a8d4'}].forEach(item=>{ html+=`
${item.h.cards} ${item.h.equity}%
${item.h.description}
`; }); html+=`
${r.analysis}
`; res.innerHTML=html; }catch(e){res.innerHTML=`
Failed: ${e.message}
`;} } function renderBankroll(){ const id=state.user?.id;if(!id)return ''; const sessions=S.get('upc:br:'+id)||[]; const total=sessions.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.profit,0); const wins=sessions.filter(s=>s.profit>0).length; let html=`
`; [{l:'Profit',v:(total>=0?'+':'')+total.toFixed(2),c:total>=0?'#4ade80':'#f87171'},{l:'Sessions',v:sessions.length,c:'#1a9a9a'},{l:'Win Rate',v:sessions.length?Math.round((wins/sessions.length)*100)+'%':'—',c:'#facc15'}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
Log Session
Date
Game
Buy-in ($)
Cash-out ($)
`; [...sessions].reverse().forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.date}${s.game?' · '+s.game+'':''}
${s.notes?`
${s.notes}
`:''}
${s.profit>=0?'+':''}${s.profit.toFixed(2)}
`; }); if(!sessions.length)html+=`
No sessions yet.
`; html+=`
`; return html; } function addSession(){ const id=state.user?.id;if(!id)return; const buyin=parseFloat(document.getElementById('br-buyin')?.value||'0'); const cashout=parseFloat(document.getElementById('br-cashout')?.value||'0'); if(!buyin||!cashout)return; const sessions=S.get('upc:br:'+id)||[]; sessions.push({id:Date.now(),date:document.getElementById('br-date')?.value||'',game:document.getElementById('br-game')?.value||'',buyin,cashout,profit:cashout-buyin,notes:document.getElementById('br-notes')?.value||''}); sessions.sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.date)-new Date(b.date)); S.set('upc:br:'+id,sessions); setTool('bankroll'); } function renderHandLog(){ const log=(state.user?.handLog||[]).slice().reverse(); let html=`
`; log.forEach(h=>{ html+=`
${h.correct?'✓':'✗'} ${h.cat} ${new Date(h.ts).toLocaleDateString()}
${h.question||''}
${h.yourAnswer?`
You: ${h.yourAnswer}
`:''}
`; }); if(!log.length)html+=`
No hands logged yet.
`; html+=`
`; return html; } function filterHandLog(q){ q=(q||'').toLowerCase(); const log=(state.user?.handLog||[]).filter(h=>(h.question||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)).reverse(); const list=document.getElementById('hl-list');if(!list)return; let html=''; log.forEach(h=>{ html+=`
${h.correct?'✓':'✗'} ${h.cat}
${h.question||''}
`; }); list.innerHTML=html||`
No results.
`; } function closeOverlay(){document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='none';} +Math.round(bb*9)} (SB 3-bet or fold vs late position)`, `Call (strong implied odds hand — acceptable SB flat vs ${openerPos})`, `Fold (SB is OOP — 3-bet or fold most hands, rarely call)`, `Call (SB can defend wide like BB)` ].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); const pot2=itr?`${bb*4}bb`:`${Math.round(bb*4)}`; return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:[], heroPos:'SB',allPos,seats, street:'Preflop', pfHistory:`${openerPos} opens to ${openSize}. Folds to hero in SB.`, potDisplay:String(pot2),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key, rangeNote:`${key} — SB vs ${openerPos} open: ${correct.includes('Fold')?'✗ Fold OOP':correct.includes('3-bet')?'✓ 3-bet':'✓ Call (tight SB flat)'}`, pfContext:`${openerPos} opens to ${openSize}. Hero in SB with ${key}. SB calling range is tight vs BB: OOP post-flop AND BB can squeeze behind. GTO SB strategy: 3-bet strong hands, call only premium suited hands with good implied odds, fold the rest. Stack: ${stackStr}.`, actionLabel:`Preflop: SB facing ${openerPos} open` }; } }, // 5. BB option when SB limps (check or raise) { cat:'preflop', name:'BB facing SB limp — check or raise', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ // BB gets to check for free or raise. Never folds (already invested 1bb). // GTO: raise with strong hands, check the rest (including weak hands — free to see flop) const isoRange=new Set(['AA','KK','QQ','JJ','TT','99','88', 'AKs','AQs','AJs','ATs','A9s','AKo','AQo','AJo','ATo', 'KQs','KJs','KTs','KQo','KJo', 'QJs','QTs','JTs','T9s','98s']); const roll=Math.random(); let cards,correct; if(roll<0.40){ cards=drawFromRange(isoRange); correct=`Raise to ${itr?'4bb':' function buildNLPFWrong(correct, pos, type, itr, bb){ const all=[ `Raise to ${itr?'2.5bb':'$'+Math.round(bb*2.5)}`, `3-bet to ${itr?'9bb':'$'+Math.round(bb*9)}`, `4-bet to ${itr?'22bb':'$'+Math.round(bb*22)}`, 'Call','Fold', `3-bet to ${itr?'12bb':'$'+Math.round(bb*12)} (oversize)`, `Min-raise to ${itr?'2bb':'$'+Math.round(bb*2)}`, 'Fold (3-bet or fold from SB OOP)' ]; return shuffleArr(all.filter(o=>o!==correct)).slice(0,3); } // ── NLH Postflop Templates ──────────────────────────────────────── const NL_POST_TEMPLATES = [ // ── POSTFLOP: IP c-bet ── { cat:'postflop', name:'IP c-bet on flop', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO','HJ']); const range=NLRFI[heroPos]||NLRFI.BTN; const cards=drawFromRange(range); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board); // GTO: bet dry boards frequently, check wet boards more, check back medium strength let correct; if(tex==='dry') correct=str==='weak'?`Bet 25% pot (range bet dry board)`:`Bet 50% pot`; else if(str==='monster'||str==='strong') correct=`Bet 50% pot`; else if(str==='draw') correct=`Check (protect checking range on wet board)`; else correct=`Check (marginal hand, mixed strategy on ${tex} board)`; const pot=itr?`${bb*6}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*6)}`; const callAmt='0'; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`Hero opens ${heroPos} to ${itr?'2.5bb':'$'+Math.round(bb*2.5)}, BB defends. Flop: ${boardStr(board)}. BB checks to hero.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'cbet'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt,blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex,str, rangeNote:`${key} on ${boardStr(board)} (${tex}) — ${str} hand`, pfContext:`Hero opened ${heroPos}, BB defended. Hero has ${key} on ${boardStr(board)} (${tex} board). BB checks. Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`Flop: IP c-bet decision (${tex} board)` }; } }, // ── POSTFLOP: OOP facing c-bet ── { cat:'postflop', name:'BB facing IP c-bet', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const oppPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const cards=drawFromRange(NLBBDEF); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board); const pot=itr?`${bb*6}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*6)}`; const betSize=Math.round(parseDollar(String(pot))*0.5); const callAmt=itr?`${bb*3}bb`:`$${betSize}`; let correct; if(str==='monster') correct='Check-raise for value'; else if(str==='strong') correct='Call (pot control, re-evaluate turn)'; else if(str==='draw'&&tex==='wet') correct='Call or check-raise semi-bluff'; else if(str==='medium') correct='Call (defend with showdown value)'; else correct='Fold (not enough equity or showdown value)'; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`${oppPos} opens, hero defends BB. Flop: ${boardStr(board)}. Hero checks. ${oppPos} bets 50% pot.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'facing_bet'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos:'BB',allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:String(callAmt),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex,str, rangeNote:`${key} on ${boardStr(board)} — ${str} (${tex})`, pfContext:`Hero in BB with ${key}. Facing ${oppPos}'s 50% pot c-bet on ${boardStr(board)} (${tex} board). Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`Flop: OOP facing c-bet (${tex} board)` }; } }, // ── POSTFLOP: Turn barrel or check ── { cat:'postflop', name:'Turn bet or check (IP)', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const cards=drawFromRange(NLRFI[heroPos]||NLRFI.BTN); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,4); const flop=board.slice(0,3), turn=board[3]; const tex=boardTex(flop); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board); const pot=itr?`${bb*14}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*14)}`; let correct; if(str==='monster'||str==='strong') correct=`Bet 66% pot (build pot for river)`; else if(str==='draw') correct=`Bet 50% pot (semi-bluff, fold equity + outs)`; else if(str==='medium') correct=`Check (pot control, bluff-catch)`; else correct=`Check (weak hand, give up or reassess river)`; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`Hero opened ${heroPos}, BB called. C-bet flop called. Turn: ${boardStr([turn])}. BB checks.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'turn'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'Turn', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex,str, rangeNote:`${key} on turn — ${str}`, pfContext:`Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Flop: ${boardStr(flop)}, Turn: ${boardStr([turn])}. BB checks. Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`Turn: barrel or check IP` }; } }, // ── POSTFLOP: River value or check ── { cat:'postflop', name:'River value bet or check', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const cards=drawFromRange(NLRFI[heroPos]||NLRFI.BTN); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,5); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board.slice(0,3)); const pot=itr?`${bb*36}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*36)}`; let correct; if(str==='monster') correct=`Bet 100% pot (thin the field, extract max)`; else if(str==='strong') correct=`Bet 66% pot (value, 3 streets)`; else if(str==='medium') correct=`Check back (marginal SDV, don't bloat pot)`; else correct=`Check back (missed draw, no value to extract)`; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`3-bet pot. Hero c-bet flop and turn, both called. River: ${boardStr([board[4]])}. Villain checks.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'river'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'River', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,str, rangeNote:`${key} — river showdown value: ${str}`, pfContext:`Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Board: ${boardStr(board)}. Villain checks river. Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`River: value bet or check IP` }; } }, // ── BLUFFING: River bluff ── { cat:'bluffing', name:'River bluff with missed draw', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); // Draw hands that are likely to miss const drawRange=new Set([...NLRFI[heroPos]||NLRFI.BTN].filter(k=>{ const c=decodeHandKey(k); return k.endsWith('s'); // suited = potential flush draw })); const cards=drawFromRange(drawRange); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,5); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board.slice(0,3)); const pot=itr?`${bb*24}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*24)}`; // Blocker = holds ace (blocks villain's value range) const hasBlocker=cards[0].rank==='A'||cards[1].rank==='A'||cards[0].rank==='K'||cards[1].rank==='K'; let correct; if(str==='weak'&&hasBlocker) correct=`Overbet bluff 120% pot (blocker advantage, polarized range)`; else if(str==='weak') correct=`Give up and check (no blocker, low fold equity)`; else correct=`Check back (showdown value, don't turn hand into bluff)`; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`Hero 3-bet from ${heroPos}, BB called. Flop bet called. Turn checked through. River: ${boardStr([board[4]])}. BB checks to hero.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'bluff'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'River', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,str, rangeNote:`${key} — ${hasBlocker?'has blocker, bluff candidate':'no blocker, check back'}`, pfContext:`Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Board: ${boardStr(board)}. Missed draw. BB checks river. Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`River: bluff or give up` }; } }, // ── BLUFFING: Flop semi-bluff check-raise ── { cat:'bluffing', name:'Semi-bluff check-raise on flop', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const cards=drawFromRange(NLBBDEF); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const str=nlStrength(cards[0],cards[1],board); const pot=itr?`${bb*6}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*6)}`; let correct; if(str==='draw'&&tex!=='dry') correct=`Check-raise semi-bluff (strong equity + fold equity)`; else if(str==='monster') correct=`Check-raise for value`; else if(str==='draw'&&tex==='dry') correct=`Call (draw has less value on dry board, insufficient fold equity for CR)`; else correct=`Call or fold (not strong enough to check-raise, not enough equity)`; const key=hkey(cards[0],cards[1]); const pfHistory=`BTN opens, hero defends BB. Flop: ${boardStr(board)}. Hero checks. BTN bets 50% pot.`; const wrong=buildPostWrong(correct,'semib'); return { game,variant:'Texas Hold\'em',holeCards:cards,communityCards:board, heroPos:'BB',allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:itr?`${bb*3}bb`:`$${Math.round(parseDollar(String(pot))*0.5)}`, blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex,str, rangeNote:`${key} on ${boardStr(board)} — ${str} (${tex})`, pfContext:`Hero in BB with ${key}. BTN bets 50% pot on ${boardStr(board)} (${tex} board). Pot: ${pot}.`, actionLabel:`Flop: semi-bluff check-raise OOP` }; } } ]; function buildPostWrong(correct, type){ const pools={ cbet:['Bet 25% pot (range bet dry board)','Bet 50% pot','Bet 100% pot (overbet)','Check (protect checking range on wet board)','Check (marginal hand, mixed strategy)','Check (marginal hand, mixed strategy on wet board)'], facing_bet:['Fold (not enough equity or showdown value)','Call (defend with showdown value)','Call (pot control, re-evaluate turn)','Check-raise for value','Call or check-raise semi-bluff'], turn:['Bet 66% pot (build pot for river)','Bet 50% pot (semi-bluff, fold equity + outs)','Check (pot control, bluff-catch)','Check (weak hand, give up or reassess river)','Bet 33% pot'], river:['Bet 100% pot (thin the field, extract max)','Bet 66% pot (value, 3 streets)','Check back (marginal SDV, don\'t bloat pot)','Check back (missed draw, no value)','Bet 33% pot (thin value)'], bluff:['Overbet bluff 120% pot (blocker advantage, polarized range)','Give up and check (no blocker, low fold equity)','Check back (showdown value, don\'t turn hand into bluff)','Bet 50% pot bluff','Bet 33% pot'], semib:['Check-raise semi-bluff (strong equity + fold equity)','Check-raise for value','Call (draw has less value on dry board)','Call or fold (not strong enough to check-raise)','Fold (insufficient equity)'] }; const pool=pools[type]||pools.cbet; return shuffleArr(pool.filter(o=>o!==correct)).slice(0,3); } // ── PLO Preflop Templates ───────────────────────────────────────── const PLO_PF_TEMPLATES = [ { cat:'preflop', name:'PLO RFI decision', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const pos=randFrom(['UTG','MP','HJ','CO','BTN']); // PLO: premium = open any pos; strong = HJ+; playable = CO+ const tierMap={UTG:['premium'],MP:['premium'],HJ:['premium','strong'],CO:['premium','strong','playable'],BTN:['premium','strong','playable'],SB:['premium','strong']}; const tiers=tierMap[pos]||['premium']; const inRange=Math.random()>0.25; // 75% show in-range const hand=inRange?drawPLOHand(tiers):drawPLOHand(['playable']); // playable from UTG = outside range const correct=inRange?`Raise pot to ${itr?Math.round(3.5*bb)+'bb':'$'+Math.round(3.5*bb)}`:'Fold'; const key=hand.handName; const wrong=['Call (no limping in PLO GTO)','Fold','Raise pot to '+( itr?'2bb':'$'+Math.round(2*bb))+' (undersize)','Raise pot to '+(itr?'5bb':'$'+Math.round(5*bb))+' (oversize)'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); const pot=itr?`${bb*1.5}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*1.5)}`; return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:[], heroPos:pos,allPos,seats,street:'Preflop', pfHistory:`Folds to hero in ${pos}. No one has entered the pot.`, potDisplay:String(pot),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key, rangeNote:`${key} (${hand.desc}) — ${inRange?'✓ In PLO open range for '+pos:'✗ Marginal, fold from '+pos}`, pfContext:`PLO. Hero in ${pos} with ${key} (${hand.desc}). Folds around. Stack: ${stackStr}. In PLO, always pot-raise or fold — no limping.`, actionLabel:`PLO Preflop: RFI from ${pos}` }; } }, { cat:'preflop', name:'PLO 3-bet pot or call vs open', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const openerPos=randFrom(['UTG','MP','HJ','CO','BTN']); const heroPos=randFrom(['CO','BTN','SB','BB'].filter(p=>p!==openerPos)); const hand=drawPLOHand(['premium','strong']); const isPremium=PLO_TIERS.premium.some(t=>t.h===hand.handName); const correct=isPremium?`3-bet pot to ${itr?Math.round(11*bb)+'bb':'$'+Math.round(11*bb)}`:'Call (flat premium rundowns and pairs)'; const key=hand.handName; const potOpenSize=itr?`3.5bb`:`$${Math.round(3.5*bb)}`; const pot=itr?`${bb*8}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*8)}`; const wrong=['Call (flat premium rundowns and pairs)','3-bet pot to '+(itr?Math.round(11*bb)+'bb':'$'+Math.round(11*bb)),'Fold','Min-raise'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:[], heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'Preflop', pfHistory:`${openerPos} pot-raises to ${potOpenSize}. Folds to hero in ${heroPos}.`, potDisplay:String(pot),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key, rangeNote:`${key} — ${isPremium?'✓ Premium: 3-bet eligible':'✓ Strong: call and see flop'}`, pfContext:`PLO. ${openerPos} opens pot. Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key} (${hand.desc}). Stack: ${stackStr}.`, actionLabel:`PLO Preflop: ${heroPos} facing ${openerPos} open` }; } } ]; // ── PLO Postflop Templates ──────────────────────────────────────── const PLO_POST_TEMPLATES = [ { cat:'postflop', name:'PLO flop: top set vs draw-heavy board', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const hand=drawPLOHand(['premium']); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!hand.cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const pot=itr?`${bb*8}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*8)}`; // In PLO, charge draws immediately — big bets on flop const correct=tex==='wet'?`Bet pot (protect vs multiple draws in PLO)`:`Bet 66% pot (value, semi-dry board)`; const key=hand.handName; const pfHistory=`3-bet pot pre. Hero in ${heroPos}. Flop: ${boardStr(board)}. Villain checks.`; const wrong=['Check (pot control)','Bet 33% pot (small bet)','Bet pot (protect vs multiple draws in PLO)','Bet 66% pot (value, semi-dry board)','Check-raise if bet into'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex, rangeNote:`${key} — PLO flop (${tex})`, pfContext:`PLO 3-bet pot. Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Flop: ${boardStr(board)} (${tex}). Villain checks. Pot: ${pot}. In PLO, draws have massive equity — charge them immediately.`, actionLabel:`PLO Flop: set on ${tex} board` }; } }, { cat:'postflop', name:'PLO flop: wrap draw decision', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ // Hero has a wrap/wrap+flush draw — should usually charge or semi-bluff const hand=drawPLOHand(['strong','playable']); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!hand.cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,3); const tex=boardTex(board); const pot=itr?`${bb*7}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*7)}`; const betAmt=itr?`${bb*3.5}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*3.5)}`; const correct=`Call (wrap draws have ~60% equity vs sets in PLO — need implied odds)`; const key=hand.handName; const pfHistory=`Opponent pot-bets ${betAmt} on ${boardStr(board)}. Hero in BB with wrap draw potential.`; const wrong=['Fold (draws are weak in PLO)','Raise pot (semi-bluff re-raise)','Call (wrap draws have ~60% equity vs sets in PLO — need implied odds)','Fold unless nut flush draw also present'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:board, heroPos:'BB',allPos,seats,street:'Flop', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:String(betAmt),blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key,tex, rangeNote:`${key} — PLO wrap draw on ${boardStr(board)}`, pfContext:`PLO. Hero in BB with ${key} (${hand.desc}). Facing pot-bet on ${boardStr(board)}. PLO draws are extremely powerful — wraps can have 13-20 outs.`, actionLabel:`PLO Flop: facing bet with wrap draw` }; } }, { cat:'bluffing', name:'PLO river: give up or bluff?', build({itr,bb,stack,stackStr,blindStr,seats,allPos,game}){ const heroPos=randFrom(['BTN','CO']); const hand=drawPLOHand(['strong','playable']); const deck=shuffle(); const board=deck.filter(c=>!hand.cards.some(h=>h.rank===c.rank&&h.suit===c.suit)).slice(0,5); const pot=itr?`${bb*30}bb`:`$${Math.round(bb*30)}`; // In PLO bluffing is riskier — opponents call wider with 2-pair, sets const correct=`Give up and check (bluffing river in PLO is high variance — opponents call wider)`; const key=hand.handName; const pfHistory=`3-bet pot pre, c-bet flop, turn checked. River: ${boardStr([board[4]])}. Villain checks to hero.`; const wrong=['Overbet bluff pot (polarized range)','Give up and check (bluffing river in PLO is high variance — opponents call wider)','Bet 50% pot bluff','Small bet 33% pot (block bet)'].filter(o=>o!==correct).slice(0,3); return { game,variant:'PLO',holeCards:hand.cards,communityCards:board, heroPos,allPos,seats,street:'River', pfHistory,potDisplay:String(pot),callAmt:'0',blinds:blindStr,stackStr, correct,wrong,key, rangeNote:`${key} — PLO river bluff spot`, pfContext:`PLO. Hero in ${heroPos} with ${key}. Board: ${boardStr(board)}. Missed draw scenario. In PLO, villain's calling range is very wide — bluffing rivers requires near-nut blockers.`, actionLabel:`PLO River: bluff or give up` }; } } ]; // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // STATE // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const state={ variant:'holdem',format:'cash',cat:'preflop', difficulty:'Intermediate',villain:'TAG', showPotOdds:false,sessionMode:false,sessionCount:0,sessionAnswers:[], user:null,users:[], quiz:null,selected:null,loading:false,streak:0, hintUsed:false,hint:null }; const S={ get:k=>{try{const v=localStorage.getItem(k);return v?JSON.parse(v):null;}catch{return null;}}, set:(k,v)=>{try{localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(v));}catch{}} }; const loadUsers=()=>S.get('upc:users')||[]; const saveUsers=u=>S.set('upc:users',u); const loadProfile=id=>S.get('upc:p:'+id); const saveProfile=(id,d)=>S.set('upc:p:'+id,d); function emptyProfile(name){ return{name,sessions:0,totalQ:0,totalCorrect:0, cats:{preflop:{q:0,c:0},postflop:{q:0,c:0},bluffing:{q:0,c:0}}, history:[],streakBest:0,handLog:[]}; } function getKey(){return localStorage.getItem('upc_api_key')||'';} async function callClaude(sys,msg,maxTokens){ const key=getKey(); if(!key) throw new Error('No API key.'); const res=await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','x-api-key':key,'anthropic-version':'2023-06-01','anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access':'true'}, body:JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:maxTokens||900,system:sys,messages:[{role:'user',content:msg}]}) }); const data=await res.json(); if(data.error) throw new Error(data.error.message); return data.content.map(i=>i.text||'').join(''); } function startApp(){ const key=(document.getElementById('api-key').value||'').trim(); const err=document.getElementById('gate-err'); err.style.display='none'; if(!key){err.textContent='Please enter your API key.';err.style.display='block';return;} if(!key.startsWith('sk-ant-')){err.textContent='Invalid key — should start with sk-ant-';err.style.display='block';return;} localStorage.setItem('upc_api_key',key); launchApp(); } function launchApp(){ document.getElementById('gate').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('app').style.display='flex'; state.users=loadUsers(); showUserSelect(); } window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{ const saved=localStorage.getItem('upc_api_key'); if(saved&&saved.startsWith('sk-ant-')){launchApp();} const inp=document.getElementById('api-key'); if(inp) inp.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')startApp();}); }); function showUserSelect(){ const users=state.users; let html=`
Upgrade Poker Coach
Select your profile
`; users.forEach(u=>{ const pct=u.totalQ?Math.round((u.totalCorrect/u.totalQ)*100):0; html+=``; }); html+=``; document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=html; document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='flex'; } function showAddUser(){ document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=`
Add Player
`; setTimeout(()=>{const n=document.getElementById('new-name');if(n)n.focus();},100); } function addUser(){ const name=(document.getElementById('new-name').value||'').trim(); const err=document.getElementById('name-err'); if(!name){err.textContent='Enter a name';err.style.display='block';return;} if(state.users.find(u=>u.name.toLowerCase()===name.toLowerCase())){err.textContent='Name taken';err.style.display='block';return;} const id='u_'+Date.now(); const profile=emptyProfile(name); state.users.push({id,name,totalQ:0,totalCorrect:0}); saveUsers(state.users); saveProfile(id,profile); selectUser(id); } function selectUser(id){ let p=loadProfile(id); if(!p) p=emptyProfile(state.users.find(u=>u.id===id)?.name||'Player'); p.sessions=(p.sessions||0)+1; saveProfile(id,p); state.user={...p,id}; state.streak=0; closeOverlay(); updateTopBar(); fetchQuiz(); } function switchUser(){showUserSelect();} function updateTopBar(){ const p=state.user;if(!p)return; document.getElementById('avatar').textContent=p.name[0].toUpperCase(); document.getElementById('uname').textContent=p.name; const tQ=p.totalQ||0,tC=p.totalCorrect||0; const pct=tQ?Math.round((tC/tQ)*100):0; const col=pct>=70?'#4ade80':pct>=40?'#facc15':'#f87171'; document.getElementById('score-badge').innerHTML=tC+'/'+tQ+' ('+pct+'%)'; } function persistUser(){ const p=state.user;if(!p)return; saveProfile(p.id,p); state.users=state.users.map(u=>u.id===p.id?{...u,totalQ:p.totalQ,totalCorrect:p.totalCorrect}:u); saveUsers(state.users); updateTopBar(); } function setVariant(v){ state.variant=v; ['holdem','plo','mixed'].forEach(x=>{const el=document.getElementById('seg-'+x);if(el)el.className=x===v?'active':'';}); fetchQuiz(); } function setFormat(f){ state.format=f; document.getElementById('seg-cash').className=f==='cash'?'active':''; document.getElementById('seg-tourney').className=f==='tournament'?'active':''; const note=document.getElementById('tourney-note'); if(note)note.style.display=f==='tournament'?'inline':'none'; fetchQuiz(); } function setCat(c){ state.cat=c; ['preflop','postflop','bluffing'].forEach(x=>{ const el=document.getElementById('cat-'+x);if(!el)return; if(x===c){el.style.background='#1a9a9a';el.style.borderColor='#1a9a9a';el.style.color='#fff';el.style.fontWeight='700';} else{el.style.background='transparent';el.style.borderColor='#333';el.style.color='#555';el.style.fontWeight='400';} }); fetchQuiz(); } function togglePotOdds(){ state.showPotOdds=!state.showPotOdds; const t=document.getElementById('po-toggle'),th=document.getElementById('po-thumb'),lb=document.getElementById('po-label'); if(t)t.style.background=state.showPotOdds?'#1a9a9a':'#222'; if(th)th.style.left=state.showPotOdds?'22px':'2px'; if(lb)lb.style.color=state.showPotOdds?'#1a9a9a':'#444'; renderQuiz(); } function startSession(){ state.sessionMode=true;state.sessionCount=0;state.sessionAnswers=[]; const btn=document.getElementById('session-btn');if(btn)btn.textContent='0/10'; fetchQuiz(); } function setTab(t){ document.getElementById('panel-train').style.display=t==='train'?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('panel-tools').style.display=t==='tools'?'flex':'none'; ['train','tools'].forEach(x=>{ const el=document.getElementById('tab-'+x);if(!el)return; el.style.color=x===t?'#1a9a9a':'#444'; el.style.fontWeight=x===t?'700':'400'; el.style.borderBottom=x===t?'2px solid #1a9a9a':'2px solid transparent'; }); if(t==='tools')setTool('equity'); } function setTool(t){ ['equity','bankroll','handlog'].forEach(x=>{ const el=document.getElementById('tool-'+x);if(!el)return; el.style.background=x===t?'#1a9a9a':'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'; el.style.color=x===t?'#fff':'#555'; }); const area=document.getElementById('tool-area');if(!area)return; if(t==='equity')area.innerHTML=renderEquityCalc(); if(t==='bankroll')area.innerHTML=renderBankroll(); if(t==='handlog')area.innerHTML=renderHandLog(); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FETCH QUIZ // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ async function fetchQuiz(){ if(!state.user)return; state.loading=true;state.quiz=null;state.selected=null;state.hintUsed=false;state.hint=null; renderQuiz(); try{ const isTourney=state.format==='tournament'; const isGame=state.variant==='mixed'?(Math.random()>0.5?'plo':'nlh'):state.variant==='plo'?'plo':'nlh'; const ctx=buildScenario(state.cat,isGame,isTourney); // Build options array const allOpts=shuffleArr([ctx.correct,...ctx.wrong].slice(0,4)); const correctIdx=allOpts.indexOf(ctx.correct); const diffDesc={ Beginner:'Simple explanation. Focus on fundamentals.', Intermediate:'Reference position, ranges, equity, pot odds.', Advanced:'GTO-level: MDF, polarization, blockers, solver frequencies.' }[state.difficulty]||''; const isPLO=isGame==='plo'; const sys=`You are an expert ${isPLO?'PLO':'NL Hold\'em'} GTO poker coach. The hand, position, preflop action, and correct answer are already determined by a range engine. Your ONLY job: write a 2-sentence vivid scenario description and a 3-4 sentence GTO explanation. DO NOT invent or change any of the action — only describe what is given to you. Villain type: ${state.villain}. ${diffDesc} ${isPLO?'PLO-specific: mention wraps, nut flush draws, multi-way equity when relevant.':''} Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown: {"scenario":"2 sentences describing the exact action given","explanation":"3-4 sentences GTO reasoning","hintText":"1 sentence hint without revealing answer"}`; const prompt=`Game: ${ctx.variant}. Format: ${isTourney?'Tournament':'Cash'}. Hero position: ${ctx.heroPos}. Hole cards: ${ctx.holeCards.map(c=>c.rank+c.suit).join(' ')}. Preflop/action context (USE EXACTLY THIS): ${ctx.pfContext} Correct action: ${ctx.correct} Wrong options shown: ${ctx.wrong.join(' / ')} Board: ${ctx.communityCards?.length?boardStr(ctx.communityCards):'(preflop)'} Range note: ${ctx.rangeNote}`; const txt=await callClaude(sys,prompt,800); const parsed=JSON.parse(txt.replace(/```json|```/g,'').trim()); const potAmt=parseDollar(ctx.potDisplay); const callAmt=parseDollar(ctx.callAmt||'0'); const ratio=callAmt>0?((potAmt+callAmt)/callAmt).toFixed(1)+':1':'N/A'; const bePct=callAmt>0?Math.round((callAmt/(potAmt+callAmt))*100)+'%':'N/A'; state.quiz={ variant:ctx.variant, gameType:isTourney?'Tournament':'Cash Game', street:ctx.street, heroPosition:ctx.heroPos, numSeats:ctx.seats, allPositions:ctx.allPos, stackSizes:buildStacks(ctx.seats,isTourney), bets:{}, potDisplay:ctx.potDisplay, blinds:ctx.blinds, holeCards:ctx.holeCards, communityCards:ctx.communityCards||[], scenario:parsed.scenario, question:'What is the correct GTO action?', options:allOpts, correctIndex:correctIdx, explanation:parsed.explanation, hintText:parsed.hintText, rangeNote:ctx.rangeNote, actionLabel:ctx.actionLabel, potOdds:callAmt>0?{ potSize:ctx.potDisplay, callAmount:'$'+callAmt, oddsRatio:ratio, breakEvenPct:bePct, impliedOdds:isPLO?'PLO implied odds are massive with wrap+flush draws':'Consider stack depth and villain tendencies', recommendation:callAmt/(potAmt+callAmt)<0.33?'Fold (pot odds insufficient)':'Call (pot odds sufficient)' }:null }; }catch(e){ state.quiz={error:true,msg:e.message||'Unknown error'}; } state.loading=false; renderQuiz(); } function buildStacks(seats,isTourney){ const base=isTourney?randFrom([5000,8000,10000,15000]):randFrom([200,300,500]); return Array.from({length:seats},()=>{ const v=base*(0.7+Math.random()*0.8); return isTourney?Math.round(Math.max(1000,v)).toLocaleString():'$'+Math.round(Math.max(50,v)); }); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // RENDER // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function tableHTML(quiz){ const cx=300,cy=150,rx=220,ry=110; const seats=quiz.numSeats||6; const posLabels=quiz.allPositions||['UTG','MP','HJ','CO','BTN','BB']; const heroPos=quiz.heroPosition||''; const stackSizes=quiz.stackSizes||[]; let inner=` `; const cc=quiz.communityCards||[]; if(cc.length>0){ const cw=37,ch=53,gap=5; const totalW=cc.length*cw+(cc.length-1)*gap; const sx=cx-totalW/2,sy=cy-ch/2; cc.forEach((c,i)=>{ const x=sx+i*(cw+gap); const isR=c.suit==='h'||c.suit==='d'; const sym=SYM[c.suit]||c.suit; inner+=` ${c.rank} ${sym} ${c.rank}`; }); if(quiz.potDisplay&&quiz.potDisplay!=='$0') inner+=`POT ${quiz.potDisplay}`; } else if(quiz.potDisplay&&quiz.potDisplay!=='$0'){ inner+=` POT ${quiz.potDisplay}`; } for(let i=0;i`; if(isBtn)inner+=`D`; inner+=`${label}`; if(isHero)inner+=`YOU`; if(stack)inner+=`${stack}`; if(isHero&&quiz.holeCards?.length){ const hc=quiz.holeCards; const cw=hc.length===4?22:26,ch=hc.length===4?32:37,cgap=3; const totalCW=hc.length*cw+(hc.length-1)*cgap; const hx=x-totalCW/2,hy=y+(stack?54:48); hc.forEach((c,ci)=>{ const cx2=hx+ci*(cw+cgap); const isR=c.suit==='h'||c.suit==='d'; const sym=SYM[c.suit]||c.suit; inner+=` ${c.rank} ${sym} ${c.rank}`; }); } } return `
`; } function renderQuiz(){ const area=document.getElementById('quiz-area');if(!area)return; if(state.loading){ area.innerHTML=`
♠
Building GTO scenario...
`; return; } const q=state.quiz;if(!q)return; if(q.error){ area.innerHTML=`
Failed to load scenario
${q.msg||''}
`; return; } let html=`
`; [q.variant,q.gameType,q.street,'Pos: '+(q.heroPosition||'—'),'vs '+state.villain,state.difficulty].forEach((t,i)=>{ html+=`${t}`; }); if(q.rangeNote){ const isIn=q.rangeNote.includes('✓'); html+=`${q.rangeNote}`; } html+=`
`; if(q.actionLabel){ html+=`
${q.actionLabel}
`; } html+=`
${tableHTML(q)}
`; html+=`
`; [{l:'Street',v:q.street,c:'#1a9a9a'},{l:'Pos',v:q.heroPosition||'—',c:'#fff'},{l:'Pot',v:q.potDisplay||'—',c:'#facc15'},{l:'Blinds',v:q.blinds||'1/2',c:'#4ade80'}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
`; html+=`
${q.scenario}
`; html+=`
${q.question}
`; if(q.potOdds){ const po=q.potOdds; html+=`
Pot Odds — ${state.showPotOdds?'Revealed':'Hidden'}
`; if(state.showPotOdds){ html+=`
`; [{l:'Pot Size',v:po.potSize,c:'#facc15'},{l:'Call Amount',v:po.callAmount,c:'#f87171'},{l:'Odds Ratio',v:po.oddsRatio,c:'#1a9a9a'},{l:'Break-even',v:po.breakEvenPct,c:'#4ade80'}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
Implied: ${po.impliedOdds}
Math says: ${po.recommendation}
`; } else { html+=`
Calculate the odds yourself — then toggle to check
`; } html+=`
`; } if(state.selected===null){ if(!state.hintUsed){ html+=``; } else if(state.hint){ html+=`
Hint: ${state.hint}
`; } } html+=`
`; (q.options||[]).forEach((opt,i)=>{ let cls='opt-btn',icon=String.fromCharCode(65+i); if(state.selected!==null){ if(i===q.correctIndex){cls+=' correct';icon='✓';} else if(i===state.selected){cls+=' wrong';icon='✗';} else cls+=' dimmed'; } html+=``; }); html+=`
`; if(state.selected!==null){ const ok=state.selected===q.correctIndex; html+=`
${ok?'Correct! ✓':'Incorrect ✗'}
${q.explanation}
`; } area.innerHTML=html; } function answer(idx){ if(state.selected!==null||!state.quiz||state.quiz.error)return; state.selected=idx; const ok=idx===state.quiz.correctIndex; state.streak=ok?state.streak+1:0; const p=state.user;if(!p)return; p.totalQ=(p.totalQ||0)+1; p.totalCorrect=(p.totalCorrect||0)+(ok?1:0); p.streakBest=Math.max(p.streakBest||0,state.streak); const cat=state.cat; p.cats=p.cats||{preflop:{q:0,c:0},postflop:{q:0,c:0},bluffing:{q:0,c:0}}; p.cats[cat]=p.cats[cat]||{q:0,c:0}; p.cats[cat].q++;if(ok)p.cats[cat].c++; p.history=[...((p.history||[]).slice(-199)),{ts:Date.now(),cat,correct:ok,q:(state.quiz.question||'').slice(0,60)}]; p.handLog=[...((p.handLog||[]).slice(-499)),{ts:Date.now(),cat,correct:ok,question:state.quiz.question,yourAnswer:state.quiz.options?.[idx]}]; persistUser(); if(state.sessionMode){ state.sessionAnswers.push({correct:ok,question:state.quiz.question}); state.sessionCount++; const btn=document.getElementById('session-btn');if(btn)btn.textContent=state.sessionCount+'/10'; if(state.sessionCount>=10)setTimeout(showSessionReport,400); } renderQuiz(); } async function getHint(){ const q=state.quiz;if(!q||state.hintUsed)return; if(q.hintText){state.hint=q.hintText;state.hintUsed=true;renderQuiz();return;} state.hintUsed=true;renderQuiz(); try{ const t=await callClaude('Give ONE short GTO poker hint (1 sentence) without revealing the answer.', 'Hand: '+JSON.stringify({holeCards:q.holeCards,scenario:q.scenario,question:q.question,rangeNote:q.rangeNote}),200); state.hint=t.replace(/```/g,'').trim(); }catch{state.hint='Consider your position, range advantage, and pot odds.';} renderQuiz(); } function showSessionReport(){ const answers=state.sessionAnswers||[]; const correct=answers.filter(a=>a.correct).length; const pct=Math.round((correct/answers.length)*100); const col=pct>=70?'#4ade80':pct>=40?'#facc15':'#f87171'; let html=`
${pct}%
${correct}/${answers.length} correct · ${state.cat} session
`; [{l:'Correct',v:correct,c:'#4ade80'},{l:'Wrong',v:answers.length-correct,c:'#f87171'},{l:'Accuracy',v:pct+'%',c:col}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
`; document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=html; document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='flex'; } function showAnalytics(){ const p=state.user;if(!p)return; const tQ=p.totalQ||0,tC=p.totalCorrect||0,ov=tQ?Math.round((tC/tQ)*100):0; const ovc=ov>=70?'#4ade80':ov>=40?'#facc15':'#f87171'; let html=`
${p.name} — Analytics
${p.sessions||0} sessions · ${tQ} questions · Best streak: ${p.streakBest||0}
`; [{l:'Accuracy',v:tQ?ov+'%':'—',c:ovc},{l:'Questions',v:tQ,c:'#1a9a9a'},{l:'Correct',v:tC,c:'#4ade80'}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
Category Breakdown
`; ['preflop','postflop','bluffing'].forEach(cat=>{ const s=p.cats?.[cat]||{q:0,c:0},pct=s.q?Math.round((s.c/s.q)*100):0,col=pct>=70?'#4ade80':pct>=40?'#facc15':'#f87171'; html+=`
${cat} ${s.c}/${s.q}${s.q>0?` ${pct}%`:''}
`; }); html+=`
`; const leaks=['preflop','postflop','bluffing'].filter(c=>(p.cats?.[c]?.q||0)>=3&&Math.round(((p.cats[c].c||0)/(p.cats[c].q||1))*100)<60); const strengths=['preflop','postflop','bluffing'].filter(c=>(p.cats?.[c]?.q||0)>=3&&Math.round(((p.cats[c].c||0)/(p.cats[c].q||1))*100)>=70); html+=`
Leaks
${leaks.length?leaks.map(c=>`
${c}
`).join(''):'
None found yet
'}
Strengths
${strengths.length?strengths.map(c=>`
${c}
`).join(''):'
Keep playing!
'}
`; document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=html; document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='flex'; } function showHandAnalyzer(){ document.getElementById('overlay-content').innerHTML=`
Hand Analyzer
Paste any hand for GTO analysis
`; document.getElementById('overlay').style.display='flex'; } async function analyzeHand(){ const txt=(document.getElementById('hand-txt')?.value||'').trim(); if(!txt)return; const res=document.getElementById('hand-result'); if(res)res.innerHTML='
Analyzing...
'; try{ const sys=`Expert GTO poker coach (NLH and PLO). Reference solver ranges, MDF, and GTO principles. Grade each street A/B/C/D. Respond ONLY valid JSON: {"summary":"","heroCards":"","gameContext":"","result":"","overallGrade":"A","gradeSummary":"","streets":[{"street":"Preflop","action":"","grade":"A","verdict":"Good","analysis":"","alternative":null}],"keyMistakes":[],"wellPlayed":[],"studyTip":""}`; const t=await callClaude(sys,'Analyze:\n\n'+txt,1500); const r=JSON.parse(t.replace(/```json|```/g,'').trim()); const gc={A:'#4ade80',B:'#86efac',C:'#facc15',D:'#f87171'}; const vc={Good:'#4ade80',Okay:'#facc15',Mistake:'#f87171'}; let html=`
${r.overallGrade}
${r.summary}
${r.gameContext} · ${r.result}
${r.gradeSummary}
`; (r.streets||[]).forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.street} ${s.verdict} ${s.grade}
${s.action}
${s.analysis}
${s.alternative?`
GTO alt: ${s.alternative}
`:''}
`; }); if(r.studyTip)html+=`
GTO Tip
${r.studyTip}
`; html+=``; if(res)res.innerHTML=html; }catch(e){ if(res)res.innerHTML=`
Failed: ${e.message}
`; } } function renderEquityCalc(){ return `
Supports NLH (2 cards) and PLO (4 cards). E.g. Ah Kd Qs Jc for PLO.
Hand 1
Hand 2
Board (optional)
`; } async function calcEquity(){ const h1=document.getElementById('eq-h1')?.value||'',h2=document.getElementById('eq-h2')?.value||'',board=document.getElementById('eq-board')?.value||''; const res=document.getElementById('eq-result');if(!res)return; const isPLO=h1.trim().split(/\s+/).length>=4; res.innerHTML='
Calculating...
'; try{ const t=await callClaude(`${isPLO?'PLO':'NLH'} equity calculator. Use standard combinatorics. ${isPLO?'In PLO players use exactly 2 hole cards + 3 board cards.':''} Respond ONLY valid JSON: {"hand1":{"cards":"${h1}","equity":47.3,"description":"top pair top kicker"},"hand2":{"cards":"${h2}","equity":52.7,"description":"overpair"},"ties":0.0,"analysis":"2-3 sentences including GTO implications."}`,`Hand 1: ${h1}\nHand 2: ${h2}\nBoard: ${board||'none (runout equity)'}`,600); const r=JSON.parse(t.replace(/```json|```/g,'').trim()); let html=''; [{h:r.hand1,col:'#7dd3fc'},{h:r.hand2,col:'#f9a8d4'}].forEach(item=>{ html+=`
${item.h.cards} ${item.h.equity}%
${item.h.description}
`; }); html+=`
${r.analysis}
`; res.innerHTML=html; }catch(e){res.innerHTML=`
Failed: ${e.message}
`;} } function renderBankroll(){ const id=state.user?.id;if(!id)return ''; const sessions=S.get('upc:br:'+id)||[]; const total=sessions.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.profit,0); const wins=sessions.filter(s=>s.profit>0).length; let html=`
`; [{l:'Profit',v:(total>=0?'+':'')+total.toFixed(2),c:total>=0?'#4ade80':'#f87171'},{l:'Sessions',v:sessions.length,c:'#1a9a9a'},{l:'Win Rate',v:sessions.length?Math.round((wins/sessions.length)*100)+'%':'—',c:'#facc15'}].forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.l}
${s.v}
`; }); html+=`
Log Session
Date
Game
Buy-in ($)
Cash-out ($)
`; [...sessions].reverse().forEach(s=>{ html+=`
${s.date}${s.game?' · '+s.game+'':''}
${s.notes?`
${s.notes}
`:''}
${s.profit>=0?'+':''}${s.profit.toFixed(2)}
`; }); if(!sessions.length)html+=`
No sessions yet.
`; html+=`
`; return html; } function addSession(){ const id=state.user?.id;if(!id)return; const buyin=parseFloat(document.getElementById('br-buyin')?.value||'0'); const cashout=parseFloat(document.getElementById('br-cashout')?.value||'0'); if(!buyin||!cashout)return; const sessions=S.get('upc:br:'+id)||[]; sessions.push({id:Date.now(),date:document.getElementById('br-date')?.value||'',game:document.getElementById('br-game')?.value||'',buyin,cashout,profit:cashout-buyin,notes:document.getElementById('br-notes')?.value||''}); sessions.sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.date)-new Date(b.date)); S.set('upc:br:'+id,sessions); setTool('bankroll'); } function renderHandLog(){ const log=(state.user?.handLog||[]).slice().reverse(); let html=`
`; log.forEach(h=>{ html+=`
${h.correct?'✓':'✗'} ${h.cat} ${new Date(h.ts).toLocaleDateString()}
${h.question||''}
${h.yourAnswer?`
You: ${h.yourAnswer}
`:''}
`; }); if(!log.length)html+=`
No hands logged yet.
`; html+=`
